name: Guided by the Stars
desc:
Special Summon 1 Synchro Monster from your Extra Deck by banishing 1 Tuner and 1 or more non-Tuner monsters from your hand, field and/or GY whose total Levels equal the Level of that monster. (This is treated as a Synchro Summon.) If "Stardust Dragon" was used as material, that monster is unaffected by your opponent's card effects until the end of the next turn.
You can banish this card from your GY; add to your hand 1 Tuner and 1 "Junk" monster, or Special Summon 1 "Stardust Dragon" from your GY or banishment, but banish it when it leaves the field.
You can only use each effect of "Guided by the Stars" once per turn.
strings: Banish from GY to search or Special Summon
Add 1 Tuner and 1 "Junk" monster from Deck to hand
